message:
[fix] Remove all placeholder text from source and documentation

Replaced placeholder patterns with proper format examples:
- Changed "(paste your key)" → "sk-ant-..." / "sk-or-v1-..."
- Changed "your-key-here" → format examples
- Consistent format across all files

Files updated:
- src/cli/simple-commands/env-template.js
- src/cli/simple-commands/proxy.js
- docs/REASONINGBANK-*.md (4 files)
- docs/ENV-SETUP-GUIDE.md
- src/hooks/redaction-hook.ts (smarter placeholder detection)

Pre-commit hook verification: Updated to recognize truncated example keys
Build status: ✅ All files compiled successfully

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -14,6 +14,12 @@ export async function validateNoSensitiveData() {
             /API_KEY="\.\.\."/i,
             /API_KEY="\(paste/i,
             /API_KEY="\(your/i,
+            /API_KEY=sk-ant-\.\.\./i,
+            /API_KEY=sk-or-v1-\.\.\./i,
+            /API_KEY="sk-ant-\.\.\."/i,
+            /API_KEY="sk-or-v1-\.\.\."/i,
+            /API_KEY=sk-ant-xxxxx/i,
+            /API_KEY=sk-or-v1-xxxxx/i,
             /TOKEN=\(paste/i,
             /TOKEN=\(your/i,
             /SECRET=\(paste/i,

@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ Open `.env` and add at minimum one of these:
 # Required: Choose at least one
 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-xxxxx  # Get from https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys
